features.name: unpacked struct with number assignment
features.description: Code should include an unpacked struct type with a numeric value assigned to a variable of that struct type
features.snippet: struct { int a; } s; initial s = 5;

features.name: unpacked struct variable assignment
features.description: Code should include two unpacked struct variables where one is assigned to the other
features.snippet: struct { logic [7:0] a; } s1, s2; initial s2 = s1;

features.name: dynamic array inside unpacked struct
features.description: Code should include an unpacked struct containing a dynamic array member, where the struct is used in an assignment context
features.snippet: struct { int q[$]; } s; initial s = '{ q: '{1,2,3} };
